content.body: There would still be an additional tick. Right now there are 2 ticks. With your proposed change there are 0 ticks.
(Ignoring the one from the user calling `.then()` on the result, shared by all)
content.formatted_body: (Ignoring the one from the user calling .then() on the result, shared by all)

content.body: This seems like a good easy optimization.
And matches the special behavior of `Promise.resolve()`
